name: WHATWG HTML spec — <dialog> element categories
goal:
Open https://html.spec.whatwg.org/multipage/interactive-elements.html#the-dialog-element (the WHATWG HTML spec section on the <dialog> element) and find the 'Categories' line that lists what content categories the <dialog> element belongs to.

Return ONLY a JSON object with EXACTLY this key:
  - "categories": a string containing the categories list. It MUST contain the phrase 'Flow content' because <dialog> is a flow content element.

Example correct output:
  {"categories": "Flow content. Sectioning root."}

The Categories line appears near the top of the <dialog> element's section in the spec. Complete with EXACTLY this JSON object as your final result.
